dashboard.subtitle: Here is an overview of your child's progress in Spark AI.

missions.title: Your Mission Map
missions.subtitle: Explore the world of AI through exciting missions. Collect XP and unlock new abilities!

lab.firstMessagePrompt: Send the first message to begin...

landing.heroDesc: Don't just use it. Spark is an adventure-driven environment where kids learn to control, understand, and evaluate AI responsibly.
landing.frameworkD1Desc: Learn to see opportunities where AI can help.
landing.frameworkD2Desc: Write clear instructions and prompts to get precise answers.
landing.frameworkD3Desc: Use the answers to create, write, and build solutions.
landing.frameworkD4Desc: Learn to critically evaluate answers, look for errors, and correct them.
landing.ctaDesc: Register your child today and open the door to the future. The first mission is free.
landing.footer: © 2026 Spark by Antigravity. All rights reserved.
